title: Intensely Roasted Chinese Tofu Mapo Tofu
description: A roasted, flaky, energizing Chinese dish featuring dry sherry and a pasta-water-emulsion, this mapo tofu is a nut-free friendly option for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into small cubes

instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Toss the tofu cubes with 1 tablespoon of sesame oil and roast in the oven for 20 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the dry sherry, soy sauce, and rice vinegar.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the cornstarch and pasta water until smooth.
Add the cornstarch mixture to the sherry mixture and whisk until combined.
Remove the tofu from the oven and add it to the sherry mixture, tossing to coat.
Return the tofu to the oven and roast for an additional 10 minutes.
Remove the tofu from the oven and garnish with chopped scallions.
Serve the mapo tofu hot over rice or noodles.
